utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I am so sorry , you guys . I did not mean to bring you down .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: No , you were right . I do not have a plan .

utterances.speaker: Pizza Guy
utterances.text: Pizza guy !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Thank God . Food .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Phoebe ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: What ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Do you have a plan ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I do not even have a pl .

emotion_cause.span: 8_I do not even have a pl .

utterances.speaker: Pizza Guy
utterances.text: Hi , one , uh , mushroom , green pepper and onion ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: No , no , that is not what we ordered ... We ordered a fat ... free crust with extra cheese .

emotion_cause.span: 10_No , no , that is not what we ordered ... We ordered a fat ... free crust with extra cheese .

utterances.speaker: Pizza Guy
utterances.text: Wait , you are not G . Stephanopoulos ? Man , my dad gonna kill me !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Wait ! Did you say G . Stephanopoulos ?

utterances.speaker: Pizza Guy
utterances.text: Yeah . This one goes across the street , I must have given him yours . Oh , bonehead , bonehead !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Wait , was this a ... a small mediterranean guy with curiously intelligent good looks ?

emotion_cause.span: 13_Yeah . This one goes across the street

utterances.speaker: Pizza Guy
utterances.text: Yeah , that sounds about right .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Was he wearing a stunning blue suit ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: And ... and a power tie ?

utterances.speaker: Pizza Guy
utterances.text: No , pretty much just a towel .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh God .

utterances.speaker: Pizza Guy
utterances.text: So you guys want me to take this back ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Are you nuts ? ! We have got George Stephanopoulos pizza !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Uh , Pheebs ? Who George Snuffalopagus ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Big Bird friend .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I see pizza !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh , I wanna see ! Let me see ! Let me see !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Hello ? Who are we spying on ?
